stemHtml: An aircraft was performing the Noise Abatement Departure Procedure 1 (NADP 1) when it suffers an engine failure. The Commander:

options.a: Must request permission from the appropriate ATS unit to abort the noise abatement procedure.
options.b: Must continue with noise abatement departure procedure 2 (NADP 2).
options.c: Must continue the noise abatement departure procedure1 (NADP 1).
options.d: Has the automatic right to ignore the noise abatement procedure.
